## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do? One or two sentences. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (`fix:`)
- [ ] New feature (`feat:`)
- [ ] Breaking change (`feat!:` / `BREAKING CHANGE`)
- [ ] Chore / tooling (`chore:`)
- [ ] Documentation (`docs:`)

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] `pnpm type-check` passes
- [ ] `pnpm build:all` succeeds
- [ ] Tests added or updated if applicable
